news.summary: In New York, Pagaya Technologies (NASDAQ: PGY) is set to reveal its Q1 2025 earnings on May 7, 2025. A conference call regarding the earnings will take place on the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET / 3:30 p.m. IDT. To participate in the live webcast presentation, interested individuals can register at investor.pagaya.com, Pagaya’s IR website. The webcast replay will also be accessible on the IR website post-event. Pagaya Technologies, traded as NASDAQ: PGY, is known for its innovative financial solutions.
news.headline: Pagaya (NASDAQ: PGY) to announce Q1 2025 earnings on May 7, 2025, with a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET / 3:30 p.m. IDT.

news.summary: Semrush Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SEMR), a prominent online visibility management SaaS platform, is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The results will be disclosed after the US market closes on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. A conference call to discuss these results will be hosted the next day, on Thursday, May 8 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call will feature Bill Wagner, CEO, and Eugene Levin, President. Key details for the conference call are as follows: Date - Thursday, May 8, 2025; Time - 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.headline: Semrush Holdings, Inc. will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 7, with an investor call on May 8.

news.summary: BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) is set to hold a conference call on May 8, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EDT to discuss their first quarter financial results. The company will also provide insights into their business outlook. Prior to the call, a press release containing BlackSky’s financial results will be shared on the same day. To tune into the live or archived webcast post the call, interested individuals can click on the provided link or visit the company’s investor relations site at http://ir.bla.
news.headline: BlackSky (NYSE: BKSY) to discuss Q1 2025 results and business outlook on May 8, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EDT.

news.summary: Phoenix-based Cable One, Inc. (NYSE: CABO) is set to hold a conference call with investors to review its first quarter 2025 performance on May 1, 2025, at 5 p.m. Eastern Time. Following the market close on the same day, the company will release a press statement detailing its financial results. The conference call can be accessed through a live audio webcast on Cable One's Investor Relations site at ir.cableone.net or by calling 1-888-800-3155 (International: 1-646-307-16).
news.headline: Cable One (NYSE: CABO) to discuss Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, at 5 p.m. ET via conference call & webcast. Press release post market close. Dial 1-888-800-3155 to join.

news.summary: A partnership between Ameresco, Inc. and SUNEL Group, known as Ameresco SUNEL Energy SA, has revealed EPC Contracts worth €303.4 million for three solar parks in southwestern Romania. This joint venture, listed under NYSE as AMRC, specializes in energy solutions and aims to support clients in transitioning to cleaner energy sources. The solar projects, totaling 466 MWp, mark a significant step in Romania's efforts to boost its renewable energy capabilities.
news.headline: Ameresco SUNEL Energy SA announces €303.4 million EPC Contracts for 466 MWp solar projects in Romania.

news.summary: LiveWire Group, Inc. (NYSE: LVWR) is set to announce its Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, before market hours. An audio webcast will be available for the public from 8-9 a.m. CT during the Harley-Davidson, Inc. event. The webcast will cover LiveWire's financial performance, business developments, and outlook updates. Participants are advised to log on and register at least 10 minutes before the start time to secure their access to the webcast.
news.headline: LiveWire Group, Inc. (NYSE: LVWR) to report Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025. Audio webcast from 8-9 a.m. CT.

news.summary: Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) based in Mayfield Heights, Ohio, is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes on May 1, 2025, pre-market hours before the NYSE opens. A conference call with investors is scheduled for 10:00 AM ET on the same day. Leading the call will be Materion's President and CEO, Jugal Vijayvargiya, alongside Vice President of Finance and CFO, Shelly Chadwick. The session will include a detailed review of the financial results in a presentation format.
news.headline: Materion Corp (NYSE: MTRN) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 1 before NYSE opens, with a 10 AM ET investor call.

news.summary: USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) declared a cash distribution of $0.525 per common unit ($2.10 annually) for Q1 2025. The payout date is May 9, 2025, for unitholders on record by April 28, 2025. USA Compression will report its Q1 2025 earnings before the U.S. markets open on Tues.
news.headline: USA Compression Partners declares $0.525 per common unit distribution for Q1 2025, with earnings release on May 6.

news.summary: In Steinhousen, Switzerland, on April 17, 2025, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) disclosed a shift in the schedule for its first quarter 2025 earnings call. The teleconference will now commence at 10 a.m. EDT and 4 p.m. CEST on Tuesday, April 29, 2025.
news.headline: Transocean changed 1Q 2025 earnings call to 10am EDT on Apr 29 due to scheduling conflict.

news.summary: Cutting-edge parachute technology has been unveiled, boasting a revolutionary design, interchangeable parachute capsules, and triple sensor redundancy. This next-generation system aims to enhance drone safety and reliability.
news.headline: ParaZero launches SafeAir M4, a new parachute recovery system compatible with DJI Matrice 4, with swappable capsules and triple sensor redundancy for enhanced drone safety.

news.summary: Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) has announced that it will be disclosing its first quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, May 1, 2025, before the markets open. The company has scheduled an audio webcast conference call for the public to join, which will take place from 8 a.m. to 9 a.m. CT. This event presents an opportunity for stakeholders and interested individuals to gain insights into the company's performance, with the webcast being accessible to a wide audience. Participants can tune in to listen to the discussion and analysis of Harley-Davidson's financial standing during this specified time slot.
news.headline: Harley-Davidson (NYSE: HOG) to announce Q1 2025 results on May 1. Webcast conference at 8 a.m. CT.

news.summary: In Oklahoma City on April 17, 2025, BancFirst Corporation (NASDAQ GS:BANF) announced a first-quarter 2025 net income of $56.1 million, equating to $1.67 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the first quarter of 2024, which saw a net income of $50.3 million, or $1.50 per diluted share.
news.headline: BancFirst Corporation's Q1 2025 net income: $56.1 million, $1.67/share; up from $50.3 million, $1.50/share in Q1 2024.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, NexPoint Hospitality Trust (the "REIT") (TSX-V: NHT.U) and NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NYSE: NXDT) revealed that they finalized the transaction where the REIT got dissolved. The Closing marked the completion of this deal, reflecting a significant development in the real estate industry. This move signifies a strategic transition, encompassing pivotal shifts in the market dynamics. The involved parties disclosed this update as a key step towards restructuring their business portfolios and enhancing operational efficiencies. The dissolution of the REIT underlines a strategic realignment aimed at optimizing assets and capital allocation.
news.headline: NexPoint Hospitality Trust goes private in transaction with NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust, REIT dissolved.

news.summary: ANSYS, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANSS) of Pittsburgh revealed today its plans to unveil quarterly earnings for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, April 30. The release is scheduled for after the market closes. The Company also referenced the ongoing transaction with Synopsys, Inc.
news.headline: Ansys (NASDAQ: ANSS) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 30 after market close, due to pending transaction with Synopsys.

news.summary: Viavi Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ: VIAV) based in Chandler, Arizona, is scheduled to release its financial results for the fiscal third quarter of 2025, which ended on March 29, 2025. news.headline: Viavi (VIAV) to announce Q3 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, after market close; earnings call to follow.

news.summary: In Montevideo, Uruguay on April 17, 2025, DLocal Limited (NASDAQ: DLO, “dLocal” or the “Company”) announced plans to disclose its financial performance for the first fiscal quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The technology-based payment platform facilitates connections between global enterprise merchants and billions of consumers in developing markets. The report is scheduled to be released after the market closes on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: dLocal, a global payments platform, to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 14, 2025 after market close.

news.summary: A recently introduced solution is providing residents with added convenience and advantages, simultaneously addressing compliance and operational issues faced by property managers. This offering aims to enhance the living experience for residents and streamline operations for property managers, offering a comprehensive solution to various challenges. The initiative comes at a crucial time when the demand for efficient and compliant property management solutions is on the rise. With an increasing number of residents seeking streamlined services, this new offering looks to bridge the gap between resident convenience and property management efficiency.
news.headline: AppFolio partners with Second Nature to improve resident experience with new offering for property managers.

news.summary: Audubon, Pennsylvania - On April 17, 2025, Globus Medical , Inc. (NYSE:GMED), a notable musculoskeletal technology company, is preparing to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter closing on March 31, 2025. The announcement is scheduled to take place post-market closure on Thursday, May 8, 2025. Interested individuals can access a copy of the announcement on the company's website at www.investors.globusmedical.com.
news.headline: Globus Medical (NYSE:GMED) to release Q1 financial results on May 8, 2025, after market close. Website for more info.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8% in the last month, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.4%. It is stated that this decline is largely attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs during this period. Furthermore, the data also indicates a rise in consumer spending by 3.2%, reflecting an improvement in the overall economic conditions. These numbers signify a positive trend in the job market and suggest a growing confidence among consumers.
news.headline: iRhythm Technologies will announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025.
PubMatic will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025. Watch out for the numbers!

news.summary: In Mocksville, North Carolina on April 17, 2025, 22nd Century Group, Inc. announced their position on nicotine regulation, as a tobacco products company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol XXII. The company advocates for smoker empowerment by providing options for nicotine consumption. They issued a notice in compliance with THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE WESTERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK.
news.headline: 22nd Century Group announces settlement of stockholder derivative actions in US District Court, April 17, 2025. (includes key information - date, settlement of actions)

news.headline: Carriage Services (NYSE: CSV) declared a quarterly dividend of 11.25¢/share payable on June 2, 2025.

news.summary: Scheduled for June 26-27, 2025, the Businessabc AI Global Summit 2025 will be hosted at the Royal Kensington Town Hall in London. This event aims to foster growth and trust in AI technology. Serving as a platform for knowledge sharing and networking, the summit in London will facilitate international collaboration and exchange of ideas crucial for the advancement of AI.
news.headline: Businessabc AI Global Summit London on June 26-27, 2025, with 50+ speakers, 1M students from 200 universities for growth in AI.

news.summary: In Columbus Grove, Ohio, on April 17, 2025, United Bancshares, Inc. (OTCQX: UBOH) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share, reflecting a 4.5% growth. Shareholders as of May 30, 2025, will receive the dividend on June 16, 2025. This decision was influenced by the average closing price in the first quarter.
news.headline: United Bancshares, Inc. (UBOH) reports Q1 2025 results with $0.23 dividend, a 4.5% increase for shareholders.

news.summary: XPO will hold its first quarter conference call on April 30, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company moves 18 billion pounds of freight per year, serving approximately 55,000 customers with 614 locations and 38,000 employees in North America and Europe. XPO's contact information includes Investor Contact Brian Scasserra at +1-617-607-6429 and Media Contact Cole Horton at +1-203-609-6004. You can access the conference call replay until May 30, 2025, by calling toll-free at 1-877-660-6853 or internationally at +1-201-612-7415, using the passcode 13753296. The webcast and results will be available on www.xpo.com.
news.headline: XPO to hold Q1 conference call on April 30, 2025, with results available on xpo.com. 18 billion pounds of freight/year moved in North America by XPO. Call replay available until May 30. XPO has 55,000 customers, 614 locations, 38,000 employees. Investor contact: Brian Scasserra +1-617-607-6429. Media contact: Cole Horton +1-203-609-6004.

news.summary: A company based in Schaumburg, Illinois has planned a conference call to analyze its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal 2025. Paylocity Holding Corporation, which trades under Nasdaq as PCTY, specializes in offering cloud-based software solutions for HR, payroll, and spend management. The conference call is set to take place on Thursday, May 1st at 4:30 pm Central Time (5:30 pm Eastern Time). This call will serve as a platform to discuss the company's progress and financial numbers publicly.
news.headline: Paylocity (Nasdaq: PCTY) to hold Q3 FY25 earnings call on May 1 at 4:30 pm CT (5:30 pm ET).

news.summary: In New York City, on April 17, 2025, DT Cloud Acquisition Corporation, traded on Nasdaq under the symbols DYCQU, DYCQ, and DYCQR, known as DT Cloud, a SPAC, announced the rescheduling of its Extraordinary General Meeting. The meeting was originally set for April 18, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time but will now take place on April 23, 2025, at the same time. Additionally, the deadline for redemption rights has been extended to April 21, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: DT Cloud Acquisition Corporation has changed its Extraordinary General Meeting date from April 18 to April 23, 2025. Redemption deadline: April 21, 2025.

(NASDAQ: TELA), a medical technology company specializing in soft-tissue reconstruction, revealed plans to disclose its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025. The company's management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET to review the financial results and offer a corporate update.
news.headline: TELA Bio to reveal Q1 2025 financials on May 8, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET for updates.

news.summary: FRP Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: FRPH) disclosed plans to host an Investor Day on May 22, 2025, in Washington D.C. The event, scheduled to commence at 10:00 A.M. EDT at Dock 79, will incorporate presentations by the company's executive management team, followed by a Q&A session. This announcement was made in Jacksonville, Fla., on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: FRP Holdings (NASDAQ: FRPH) to hold Investor Day on May 22, 2025 in Washington D.C. with presentations starting at 10:00 A.M. EDT.

news.summary: The coffee company based in Little Rock, Arkansas, Westrock Coffee Company (NASDAQ: WEST), revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 8, 2025, post the market's closure. The Company intends to hold a live earnings conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET following the announcement.
news.headline: Westrock Coffee Company to announce Q1 2025 results on May 8th, 2025 after market close, with earnings call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Nvini Group Limited (Nasdaq: NVNI) received notification from Nasdaq stating it is not in compliance with Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), needing a minimum bid price of $1 per share, and Listing Rule 5550(b)(2), needing a minimum Market Value of Listed Securities (MVLS) of $35 million. The company, a top acquirer of private SaaS B2B firms in Latin America, faces potential consequences due to the violation.
news.headline: Nvni Group (Nasdaq: NVNI) gets non-compliance notice from Nasdaq for not meeting $1 bid price and $35 million MVLS.

news.summary: A renowned lifestyle brand, Allbirds, Inc. (NASDAQ: BIRD), celebrated for its sustainable material innovations, has disclosed that its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 will be unveiled post-market closure on Thursday, May 8, 2025. As part of the announcement, a conference call to deliberate on the results is scheduled for Thursday at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET).
news.headline: Allbirds to release first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8. Earnings conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT, 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Scottsdale-based company TPI Composites, Inc. (Nasdaq: TPIC) revealed plans to unveil its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, after the market closes. This disclosure will be accompanied by a conference call scheduled for 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day.
news.headline: TPI Composites, Inc. will release Q1 2025 results on May 8, 2025, with a conference call at 5pm Eastern Time.

news.summary: A conference call will be conducted by Hub Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: HUBG) on Thursday, May 8, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to address the first quarter 2025 results. The outcomes will be disclosed through a press release after the market concludes on the same day.
news.headline: Hub Group (Nasdaq: HUBG) will discuss Q1 2025 results on May 8, 2025, in a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.summary: Orrstown Financial Services, Inc. disclosed that they will reveal their first quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, April 22, 2025, as the markets close. The company, which oversees Orrstown Bank, will conduct a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, April 23, 2025, beginning at 9:00 am ET to discuss their performance. The holding company, listed as ORRF on NASDAQ, invited stakeholders to join the call for insights into their quarterly figures.
news.headline: Orrstown Financial Services will release Q1 2025 earnings on April 22 and host a review on April 23 at 9AM ET.

news.summary: Leadership will be presenting the financial outcomes of the first quarter of 2025 and conducting an interactive session to address investor queries during a virtual event. This event is crucial for stakeholders to have a comprehensive understanding of the company's performance. The Q1 results will shed light on the company's progress and growth, with key figures and statistics being shared during the presentation. The interactive Q&A session will allow investors to seek clarifications or additional information regarding the financial data and future prospects. This event serves as a platform for transparency and open communication between management and investors, aiming to create a more informed investor base and establish trust in the company's operations and strategic decisions.
news.headline: eXp World Holdings to discuss Q1 2025 results on May 6 at virtual event with investor Q&A.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: DCOM) revealed plans to extend its operations into Lakewood, New Jersey. The expansion decision was made by the Board of Directors and signifies a strategic move for the parent company of Dime Community Bank. This development marks a significant step for the company as it looks to broaden its presence and services in new market territory.
news.headline: Dime Community Bancshares plans to expand into Lakewood, NJ, as announced on April 17, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 4% in 2022, following a 3.3% growth in 2021. The growth is driven by strong consumer spending and investments, with emerging markets leading the way. Meanwhile, inflation is expected to reach 5% this year, surpassing the target in many countries. The labor market is also showing signs of improvement, with unemployment rates dropping to 6% globally. However, various challenges such as supply chain disruptions and geopolitical tensions continue to pose risks to the economic recovery.Experts suggest that policymakers should remain vigilant and take appropriate measures to ensure sustainable growth in the coming years.
news.headline: Sachem Capital schedules Q1 2025 earnings release and call.

news.summary: SoundThinking has welcomed Burton Goldfield, the ex-President and CEO of TriNet, to its Board of Directors. This addition brings significant expertise in the form of Goldfield, who previously served in leadership roles at the prominent company TriNet. With this new appointment, SoundThinking anticipates benefiting from Goldfield's wealth of experience in the industry, contributing to the company's growth and development moving forward.
news.headline: SoundThinking adds Burton Goldfield, ex TriNet President/CEO, to its Board of Directors.

news.summary: Today in Lubbock, Texas, South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPFI) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common stock share. The dividend, declared by the Board of Directors, will be distributed on May 12, 2025. Shareholders as of April 28, 2025, will be eligible to receive the dividend. This initiative marks a key financial decision by South Plains, the parent company of City Bank.
news.headline: South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPFI) declares $0.15/share quarterly cash dividend, payable on May 12 to shareholders.

news.summary: With significant experience in AI-driven innovation and scalable tech-enabled growth, Wade joins with a track record of success in implementing cutting-edge technologies to drive advancement. His proficient expertise in this field is underscored by impressive results, including a X% increase in operational efficiency and a Y% boost in revenue within a short period. Wade's strategic vision and proficiency in leveraging artificial intelligence to fuel progress make him a valuable addition to the team.
news.headline: Goosehead Insurance adds Bill Wade to Board, bringing AI expertise for tech growth.
White House Official: Trump will sign executive order to extend Federal hiring freeze until July.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Zenas BioPharma, Inc. based in Waltham, Mass., disclosed that the Compensation Committee of the Company's Board of Directors awarded non-qualified stock options to two incoming officers as inducements for joining the Company. This grant was in adherence to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Zenas is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ZBIO. The Company is dedicated to leading in the development and marketing of autoimmune disease treatments.
news.headline: Zenas BioPharma granted non-qualified stock options to two officers on April 15, 2025, under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Carriage Services, Inc. (NYSE: CSV) revealed intentions to unveil its first-quarter 2025 results on April 30, 2025, post-market closure. Alongside this disclosure, the company has set up a conference call, to be webcast live on May 1, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time.
news.headline: Carriage Services to release 2025 Q1 results on April 30; conference call on May 1 at 8:00am CT.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is forecasted to grow by 5.6% in 2021, the fastest rate seen since 1973. This growth is attributed to the rapid recovery being seen in major economies and the deployment of COVID-19 vaccines. However, despite this positive outlook, there is a noticeable disparity in the recovery between advanced economies and developing countries. Advanced economies are estimated to grow by 5.4% in 2021, while developing economies are predicted to experience a growth rate of 6%. The report also highlights the importance of ensuring equitable access to vaccines worldwide to support a more balanced economic recovery.
news.headline: Former Credit Suisse CEO Thiam announces candidacy for President in Ivory Coast.
